user.title: Cellcom Energy — Login
user.description: Enter your Cellcom account phone number. You will receive an SMS with a one-time code.

data_description.phone: The mobile number registered to your Cellcom account (e.g. 0502959996)

otp.title: Enter SMS Code
otp.description: A 6-digit code was sent to {phone}. Enter it below.

id_number.title: Verify Your Identity
id_number.description: Enter the Israeli ID number (תעודת זהות) registered to your Cellcom account.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Cellcom Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Click confirm to send a new SMS code to {phone}.

reauth_otp.title: Enter New SMS Code
reauth_otp.description: A new 6-digit code was sent to {phone}.

reauth_id.title: Verify Your Identity
reauth_id.description: Enter your Israeli ID number to complete re-authentication.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Cellcom servers. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_phone: Invalid phone number. Enter a valid Israeli mobile number.
error.invalid_otp: The code is incorrect or has expired. Request a new code and try again.
error.invalid_id: The ID number does not match this account.
error.otp_expired: The verification code has expired. Please restart the login.
error.too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the HA log for details.

abort.already_configured: This Cellcom account is already configured.
